results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
Equities hit records as geopolitical risks linger | Market Navigator | IG International
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities
Geopolitical market impacts and investment perspectives for 2026 | J.P. Morgan Private Bank U.S.

summary: US-Israel military action against Iran (late Feb 2026) closed Strait of Hormuz, spiked energy prices +30% globally. IMF baseline: global growth 3.1%, inflation 4.4% in 2026; adverse scenario cuts growth to 2.5%, inflation 5.4%. Additional flashpoints: US intervention in Venezuela, NATO posture in Greenland. Defensive sectors (staples, utilities) and energy stocks outperforming.
